rejected_findings.finding: MAX_INPUTS and MAX_OUTPUTS enforcement in service layer — defense-in-depth duplication
rejected_findings.reason: Zod schemas already enforce limits at the route edge. No direct service callers bypass routes in current codebase. Duplicate enforcement is premature complexity.
Correctly a Phase 3 placeholder per ROADMAP. Not blocking, not a bug.
No CI exists yet. TypeScript already passes typecheck. Build test without CI pipeline is premature.

rejected_findings.finding: CORS configured with origin: true (wildcard) — CWE-942
rejected_findings.reason: Intentional design for a public Cashu mint. Any wallet from any origin must be able to access the mint. credentials:false prevents cookie-based CSRF. This is the correct and expected configuration for a public mint service.

rejected_findings.finding: Private keys stored plaintext in-memory in KeysetState — CWE-312
rejected_findings.reason: Software-based key storage without HSM is a universal reality of this class of software. Not fixable at code level without HSM infrastructure. Document as operational security requirement. Phase 2+ concern.

rejected_findings.finding: NUT-12 DLEQ proof generation not implemented — CWE-347
rejected_findings.reason: Explicitly Phase 2 per ROADMAP. The stub is marked 'Not implemented — Phase 2'. Deferred intentionally. Not a bug in Phase 1.

rejected_findings.finding: Verify LND subscribeInvoices reconnect resilience — TLS/macaroon auth error handling
rejected_findings.reason: No actionable code change without live LND infrastructure. 5s backoff catch-all exists in server.ts. Stream error handling in lnd.ts throws LightningBackendError which triggers restart. Deferred until LND test environment available.

rejected_findings.finding: Add runtime guard for LND gRPC package loading (lnd.ts:47 double-cast)
rejected_findings.reason: Necessary pattern for untyped gRPC proto bindings. No type-safe alternative without switching gRPC client libraries. Low risk — constructor throws immediately if proto invalid.
Readability refactor, not a bug. Not blocking any functionality. Low priority relative to test coverage gaps.

unproductive_audits.reason: Found 0 actionable findings. All previously identified issues (CORS wildcard, plaintext keys, DLEQ stub) already in lessons as intentional design decisions.
